headline: Franklin Resources, Inc. Announces Preliminary Month-End Assets Under Management
summary: SAN MATEO, Calif., May 05, 2026--Franklin Resources, Inc. (Franklin Templeton) (NYSE: BEN) today reported preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $1.74 trillion at April 30, 2026, compared to $1.68 trillion at March 31, 2026. This month’s increase in preliminary AUM reflected the positive impact of markets and long-term net inflows of $4 billion, inclusive of $1 billion of long-term net outflows at Western Asset Management1. headline: KKR & Co. Shares Gain as Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, AUM Rises Y/Y
summary: KKR shares rise after Q1 earnings beat estimates, fueled by strong AUM growth and higher fees, though rising expenses temper overall gains.

headline: 1 Mooning  Stock to Keep an Eye On and 2 We Brush Off
summary: Great things are happening to the stocks in this article. They’re all outperforming the market over the last month because of positive catalysts such as a new product line, constructive news flow, or even a loyal Reddit fanbase.

headline: Assessing Franklin Resources (BEN) Valuation After Earnings Beat And Analyst Upgrades
summary: Franklin Resources (BEN) is back in focus after stronger than expected second quarter results, improved private markets fundraising, and upgraded guidance prompted upbeat commentary and rating changes from both Goldman Sachs and Barclays. See our latest analysis for Franklin Resources. At a share price of $29.70, Franklin Resources has seen a 26.92% 30 day share price return and a 24.79% year to date share price return. The 1 year total shareholder return of 56.92% suggests momentum has been...
